title: What Happens Next Dialogue for Invite User
story: As a product administrator who just invited a user, I want to see a confirmation with a 'What happens next?' link, so that I can understand the invite workflow and self-support without contacting support.
description:
After inviting a user, display a Bootstrap Toast notification with 'Invite Sent: What happens next?' where 'What happens next?' is a clickable link that opens a modal. The modal loads tutorial content from the WordPress JSON API (tutorial post 10013) to explain the invite process to the admin.

This helps admins understand the full invite flow — what the invitee receives, what actions are required, and how to troubleshoot — without needing to contact support.
acceptance_criteria: Bootstrap Toast appears after successful invite with 'Invite Sent' message
'What happens next?' is a clickable link in the toast
Clicking the link opens a modal with tutorial content
Modal content is loaded from WordPress JSON API (post 10013)
Toast auto-dismisses or can be manually closed
ux_changes: Bootstrap Toast notification after invite. Modal with WordPress tutorial content explaining the invite workflow.
api_changes: Outbound: fetches tutorial JSON from WordPress REST API (wp/v2/tutorials/10013).
implementation_notes: Uses Bootstrap 5.3 Toast component. Tutorial content is managed in WordPress and fetched via REST API, allowing content updates without code changes.
comment_summary: Developer started work and submitted for review.
